title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS company with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and a leader-doer mindset building flows, dashboards, and data models. Cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, plus collaboration with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech expertise aligns perfectly with Finout's cloud cost-management focus, deep Salesforce and RevOps scaling experience directly applicable to $30M+ ARR operations, and leader-doer profile matches stated needs.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed Finout is building out Head of RevOps to scale revenue operations across Tel Aviv and New York—exactly the kind of high-growth fintech infrastructure play that's reshaping how enterprises optimize spend. With your 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS RevOps and deep Salesforce expertise across 9-figure pipelines, you'd be a natural fit for this leadership role. Given your base in the Tel Aviv area and track record building global cross-functional operations teams, I thought this was worth a direct conversation.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Cyngn, an autonomous vehicle/robotics technology company, is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations. Requires 8+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or similar GTM analytics roles in B2B SaaS or enterprise software. The role demands strong data analytics, forecasting, and funnel modeling skills with CRM and BI tools, a track record building systems that accelerate pipeline velocity and forecast precision, and the ability to work cross-functionally with sales, marketing, finance, and product to unify GTM execution.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps directly aligns with Cyngn's enterprise software requirements. Strong match on data analytics, forecasting, CRM/BI expertise, and cross-functional GTM leadership—though autonomous vehicle/robotics is outside his core fintech/AI-native background.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations infrastructure for B2B SaaS companies, scaling forecasting accuracy and pipeline velocity through data-driven GTM systems. Cyngn's mission in autonomous vehicles represents a compelling inflection point where disciplined RevOps can unlock growth—I'd welcome exploring how my experience unifying sales, marketing, and finance ops could accelerate your enterprise motion.

score_reason: Exceptional match: RevOps Manager role aligns perfectly with Omri's core expertise in B2B SaaS GTM, territory strategy, and Salesforce operations. Territory optimization, pipeline forecasting, and analytical rigor are direct strengths in his background.
ai_opener: Omri Gonen here — 15+ years building RevOps functions in B2B SaaS. Your territory strategy mandate at Gong resonates deeply: I've spent the last decade architecting territory models that directly impact pipeline predictability and quota attainment. With your focus on whitespace analysis and Salesforce optimization, I'd love to explore how my experience scaling GTM operations could drive revenue efficiency for your team.
